user_question: gia đình ông/bà ĐỊCH THỊ LAN năm 2024 có bao người

query_plan.original_question: Gia đình ông/bà ĐỊCH THỊ LAN năm 2024 có bao nhiêu người

sql: SELECT households."family.hostName" AS host_name, households."family.code" AS household_id, households."administrative.district" AS district, households."administrative.commune" AS commune, COUNT(*) AS household_member_count FROM members INNER JOIN households ON members."family.code" = households."family.code" AND members."administrative.year" = households."administrative.year" AND members."administrative.district" = households."administrative.district" AND members."administrative.commune" = households."administrative.commune" WHERE LOWER(households."family.hostName") = 'địch thị lan' AND households."administrative.year" = 2024 GROUP BY host_name, household_id, district, commune
